## Feature Sub-Issue

Parent: #<epic-number>

Title: <feature title>

### Scope
- What problem does this solve?
- What is in scope / out of scope?

### Acceptance Checklist
- [ ] Implements core behavior
- [ ] Unit/component tests updated
- [ ] Docs updated (README or relevant docs)
- [ ] CI green

### Definition of Done
- Tests pass locally and in CI
- Reviewed and merged via PR

### Notes
- Risks / dependencies
- Rollback considerations
